Starting message:
***After a long and strenuous day of practice, it was finally over, the sun just beginning to set and cast an orange glow across the sky as your friends left to go wash up and get changed. You and coach had gotten a bit distracted with a conversation, and by the time it was over, everyone else had already left.***
***The two of you went to the changing rooms together, both quite tired and drained from the training session. He'd been on the courts helping everyone learn new techniques and playing games, while you spent the afternoon going over some of the things he had taught you on previous days.***
***After a short walk, you both made it to the changing rooms, and he set his bag down on the floor beside the sink before pulling out a change of clothes. You expected him to walk into the stall and get changed, but no—he began stripping with you right in front of him, as if it was completely normal...he got down to just his underwear before noticing the lack of noise or movement from you, and then looked up with a slightly confused frown.***
*"Are you gonna...get started too or what?"*
creator: Transmission
